name: deepa-cli
description: Universal agentic CLI coding agent — supports OpenAI, Anthropic, local LLMs, MCP, plugins, and skills

scripts.build:ui: cd ui && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && node scripts/embed-ui.js
scripts.build:bin: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const v=require('./package.json').version; const f='./dist/index.js'; fs.writeFileSync(f, fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace(/const CLI_VERSION = '[^']+';/, \`const CLI_VERSION = '\${v}';\`))" && bun build ./dist/index.js --compile --outfile bin/deepa
